content.thinking: The schema file likely has the table definition. Let me read it.

content.content:
1	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_migrations (
2	  version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
3	  applied_at TEXT NOT NULL
4	);
5	
6	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sessions (
7	  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
8	  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
9	  claude_session_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
10	  topic TEXT NOT NULL,
11	  summary TEXT,
12	
13	  status TEXT DEFAULT 'active',
14	  ttl_days INTEGER DEFAULT 30,
15	  dormant_after_days INTEGER DEFAULT 30,
16	  archive_after_days INTEGER DEFAULT 90,
17	  archived_at TEXT,
18	
19	  last_used TEXT NOT NULL,
20	  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
21	);
22	
23	CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_project_status
24	ON sessions(project_id, status);
25	
26	CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_project_last_used
27	ON sessions(project_id, last_used);
28	
29	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_decisions (
30	  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
31	  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
32	  decision TEXT NOT NULL,
33	  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
34	  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
35	);
36	
37	CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_decisions_unique
38	ON session_decisions(session_id, decision);
39	
40	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_open_questions (
41	  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
42	  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
43	  question TEXT NOT NULL,
44	  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
45	  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
46	);
47	
48	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_files (
49	  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
50	  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
51	  path TEXT NOT NULL,
52	  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
53	  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
54	);
55	
56	CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_files_unique
57	ON session_files(session_id, path);
58	
59	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_tags (
60	  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
61	  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
62	  tag TEXT NOT NULL,
63	  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
64	  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
65	);
66	
67	CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_tags_unique
68	ON session_tags(session_id, tag);
69	
70	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_aliases (
71	  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
72	  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
73	  alias TEXT NOT NULL,
74	  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
75	  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
76	);
77	
78	CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_aliases_unique
79	ON session_aliases(session_id, alias);
80	
81	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_events (
82	  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
83	  session_id TEXT,
84	  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
85	  event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
86	
87	  question TEXT,
88	  answer_summary TEXT,
89	  raw_response_path TEXT,
90	
91	  match_score REAL,
92	  match_reason TEXT,
93	  was_new_session INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
94	  was_orphan_recovery INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
95	
96	  tokens_in INTEGER,
97	  tokens_out INTEGER,
98	  duration_ms INTEGER,
99	
100	  error TEXT,
101	  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
102	
103	  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
104	);
105	
106	CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_events_project_created
107	ON session_events(project_id, created_at);
108	
109	CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_events_type_created
110	ON session_events(event_type, created_at);
111	
112	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS clusters (
113	  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
114	  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
115	  name TEXT NOT NULL,
116	  description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
117	  tool_profile_default TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bare',
118	  static_factsheet_policy TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'deny',
119	  baseline_session_id TEXT,
120	  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
121	  trust_state TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unprepared',
122	  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
123	  last_used TEXT NOT NULL,
124	  UNIQUE(project_id, id)
125	);
126	
127	CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_clusters_project_status
128	ON clusters(project_id, status);
129	
130	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cluster_factsheets (
131	  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
132	  cluster_id TEXT NOT NULL,
133	  version INTEGER NOT NULL,
134	  content_json TEXT NOT NULL,
135	  source_session_id TEXT,
136	  baseline_session_id TEXT,
137	  git_rev TEXT,
138	  generated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
139	  verified_at TEXT,
140	  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
141	  FOREIGN KEY(cluster_id) REFERENCES clusters(id)
142	);
143	
144	CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cluster_factsheets_version
145	ON cluster_factsheets(cluster_id, version);
146	
147	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cluster_file_hashes (
148	  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
149	  cluster_id TEXT NOT NULL,
150	  factsheet_id TEXT NOT NULL,
151	  path TEXT NOT NULL,
152	  hash TEXT NOT NULL,
153	  file_size INTEGER NOT NULL,
154	  last_verified TEXT NOT NULL,
155	  FOREIGN KEY(cluster_id) REFERENCES clusters(id),
156	  FOREIGN KEY(factsheet_id) REFERENCES cluster_factsheets(id)
157	);
158	
159	CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cluster_file_hashes_factsheet
160	ON cluster_file_hashes(factsheet_id);
161	
162	CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cluster_events (
163	  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
164	  cluster_id TEXT NOT NULL,
165	  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
166	  event_type TEXT NOT NULL,

file.content:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_migrations (
  version INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
  applied_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sessions (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  claude_session_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  topic TEXT NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT,

  status TEXT DEFAULT 'active',
  ttl_days INTEGER DEFAULT 30,
  dormant_after_days INTEGER DEFAULT 30,
  archive_after_days INTEGER DEFAULT 90,
  archived_at TEXT,

  last_used TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_project_status
ON sessions(project_id, status);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sessions_project_last_used
ON sessions(project_id, last_used);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_decisions (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  decision TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
);

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_decisions_unique
ON session_decisions(session_id, decision);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_open_questions (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  question TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_files (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  path TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
);

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_files_unique
ON session_files(session_id, path);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_tags (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  tag TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
);

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_tags_unique
ON session_tags(session_id, tag);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_aliases (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  alias TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
);

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_aliases_unique
ON session_aliases(session_id, alias);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_events (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  session_id TEXT,
  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  event_type TEXT NOT NULL,

  question TEXT,
  answer_summary TEXT,
  raw_response_path TEXT,

  match_score REAL,
  match_reason TEXT,
  was_new_session INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  was_orphan_recovery INTEGER DEFAULT 0,

  tokens_in INTEGER,
  tokens_out INTEGER,
  duration_ms INTEGER,

  error TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,

  FOREIGN KEY(session_id) REFERENCES sessions(id)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_events_project_created
ON session_events(project_id, created_at);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_session_events_type_created
ON session_events(event_type, created_at);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS clusters (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  tool_profile_default TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bare',
  static_factsheet_policy TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'deny',
  baseline_session_id TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  trust_state TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unprepared',
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  last_used TEXT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE(project_id, id)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_clusters_project_status
ON clusters(project_id, status);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cluster_factsheets (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  cluster_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  version INTEGER NOT NULL,
  content_json TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_session_id TEXT,
  baseline_session_id TEXT,
  git_rev TEXT,
  generated_at TEXT NOT NULL,
  verified_at TEXT,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  FOREIGN KEY(cluster_id) REFERENCES clusters(id)
);

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cluster_factsheets_version
ON cluster_factsheets(cluster_id, version);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cluster_file_hashes (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  cluster_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  factsheet_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  path TEXT NOT NULL,
  hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  file_size INTEGER NOT NULL,
  last_verified TEXT NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY(cluster_id) REFERENCES clusters(id),
  FOREIGN KEY(factsheet_id) REFERENCES cluster_factsheets(id)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cluster_file_hashes_factsheet
ON cluster_file_hashes(factsheet_id);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cluster_events (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  cluster_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  details_json TEXT,
  duration_ms INTEGER,
  tokens_in INTEGER,
  tokens_out INTEGER,
  cost_usd REAL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cluster_events_cluster_created
ON cluster_events(cluster_id, created_at);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS consult_comparisons (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  cluster_id TEXT,
  question TEXT NOT NULL,

  cluster_answer TEXT,
  cluster_duration_ms INTEGER,
  cluster_cost_usd REAL,
  cluster_was_not_in_context INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  shadow_method TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'direct_fresh',
  shadow_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  shadow_error TEXT,
  direct_answer TEXT,
  direct_duration_ms INTEGER,
  direct_cost_usd REAL,

  cluster_score INTEGER,
  direct_score INTEGER,
  preferred TEXT,
  cluster_errors_json TEXT,
  direct_errors_json TEXT,
  judge_reasoning TEXT,
  judged_at TEXT,

  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_consult_comparisons_project_created
ON consult_comparisons(project_id, created_at);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_consult_comparisons_cluster_judged
ON consult_comparisons(cluster_id, judged_at);

content.text:
The `clusters` table fields (from `src/schema.sql:112-125`):

1. `id` (TEXT, PRIMARY KEY)
2. `project_id` (TEXT, NOT NULL)
3. `name` (TEXT, NOT NULL)
4. `description` (TEXT, NOT NULL DEFAULT '')
5. `tool_profile_default` (TEXT, NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bare')
6. `static_factsheet_policy` (TEXT, NOT NULL DEFAULT 'deny')
7. `baseline_session_id` (TEXT)
8. `status` (TEXT, NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active')
9. `trust_state` (TEXT, NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unprepared')
10. `created_at` (TEXT, NOT NULL)
11. `last_used` (TEXT, NOT NULL)

With a unique constraint on `(project_id, id)`.
